title: Subitem column on Parent
excerpt: I have searched and if I’ve missed it that is my mistake, but I’m trying to figure out how to add the subitem column as indicated by the purple arrows.

posts.author: cindyraney (Cindy Raney)
posts.cookedHtml:
I have searched and if I’ve missed it that is my mistake, but I’m trying to figure out how to add the subitem column as indicated by the purple arrows.

image1900×509 103 KB

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Check out this article in the monday.com support site:

Support

All about subitems

6 min read Feature   Subitems provide your board with a deeper structure by letting you add an extra layer of information within the items on your board! You can use them to better support you...

The “Get a visual overview of subitem data” section (which should be linked) is the one you need.

posts.author: cindyraney (Cindy Raney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thank you. Yes, I’ve read that, but it does not cover how to produce the column on the parent row pictured above and here is another example:
